evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Internally consistent: mercadopago.SDK(token), sdk.preference().create(), JS v2 SDK with new MercadoPago(key, {locale}) and mp.checkout({preference:{id}}). x-signature ts/v1 HMAC-SHA256 format matches widely documented MP webhook scheme. No version explicitly claimed but methods are self-consistent.
evidence.executability: All fenced blocks parse. Backend has imports and env loading; webhook handler may fail validation in practice because data.id is read from query_params but MP sends it that way for webhooks, so plausible. Frontend depends on script tag in index.html which is documented. No sandbox-infeasible patterns (no ngrok/sudo).
evidence.completeness: (a) credentials acquisition URL+menu given; (b) pip & npx install in bash; (c) env template with MP_ACCESS_TOKEN, MP_WEBHOOK_SECRET, REACT_APP_MERCADOPAGO_PUBLIC_KEY, REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL — referenced consistently in code; (d) backend main.py complete; (e) React component complete; (f) test procedure described but no single runnable test command in a bash block — slight gap, still 5 acceptable.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official mercadopago.com.ar/developers URLs placed inline next to relevant code/config sections, plus GitHub SDK link. Matches canonical domain pattern for MercadoPago official docs.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; applied long-tail handling: internally consistent SDK method names and webhook signature scheme, no version string but methods coherent => CF=4. No explicit final test bash command but testing procedures provided.
